[Uploading gerador_carrossel.html…]()
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Gerador de Carrossel — Dra. Rosângela Andrade</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;1,300;1,400&family=Montserrat:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/html2canvas/1.4.1/html2canvas.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jszip/3.10.1/jszip.min.js"></script>
<style>
:root{--v1:#5C0726;--v2:#781F25;--v3:#AB6C65;--creme:#F0E0D8;--branco:#FFFFFF;--d1:#C9A84C;--d2:#E8C97A;--preto:#0A0A0A;--ui:#141414;--card:#1c1c1c;--borda:#2a2a2a;--muted:#666;}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
body{background:#111;color:#fff;font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;min-height:100vh;}

.hdr{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--v1) 0%,#1a0008 100%);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.25);padding:16px 28px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;}
.hdr img{width:42px;height:42px;object-fit:contain;}
.hdr h1{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;}
.hdr span{font-size:7.5px;color:var(--d1);letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;display:block;margin-top:1px;}

.app{display:grid;grid-template-columns:400px 1fr;min-height:calc(100vh - 75px);}

.panel{background:var(--ui);border-right:1px solid #1e1e1e;padding:20px 18px;overflow-y:auto;max-height:calc(100vh - 75px);}
.sec{font-size:7px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:3px;color:var(--d1);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
.sec::after{content:'';flex:1;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(to right,rgba(201,168,76,.3),transparent);}

.sb{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--borda);border-radius:7px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:8px;}
.sb-hdr{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:11px;}
.snum{font-size:7px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--d1);text-transform:uppercase;}
.badge{display:inline-block;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:20px;font-size:6.5px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;}
.bg{background:rgba(92,7,38,.5);color:#f5a0b0;border:1px solid rgba(92,7,38,.7);}
.bc{background:rgba(201,168,76,.1);color:var(--d1);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.3);}
.bd{background:rgba(92,7,38,.7);color:#fff;border:1px solid var(--v1);}
.bf{background:#111;color:#555;border:1px solid #2a2a2a;}

select,input[type="text"],input[type="number"],textarea{width:100%;background:#0f0f0f;border:1px solid var(--borda);color:#fff;font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:11px;padding:7px 9px;border-radius:5px;transition:border-color .2s;}
select{padding:4px 7px;font-size:9px;cursor:pointer;}
select:focus,input:focus,textarea:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--d1);}
textarea{min-height:60px;resize:vertical;line-height:1.6;}
lbl{display:block;font-size:7px;font-weight:600;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin:8px 0 3px;}

/* RICH TEXT TOOLBAR */
.rte-wrap{border:1px solid var(--borda);border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;}
.rte-toolbar{background:#0a0a0a;border-bottom:1px solid var(--borda);padding:5px 7px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.rte-toolbar button{background:#1a1a1a;border:1px solid #2a2a2a;color:#aaa;font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:10px;padding:3px 7px;border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;line-height:1;}
.rte-toolbar button:hover{background:#2a2a2a;color:#fff;border-color:#444;}
.rte-toolbar button.active{background:var(--v1);color:#fff;border-color:var(--v1);}
.rte-toolbar .sep{width:1px;height:16px;background:#2a2a2a;margin:0 2px;}
.rte-toolbar select{width:auto;padding:3px 5px;font-size:9px;background:#1a1a1a;border-color:#2a2a2a;}
.rte-toolbar input[type="number"]{width:46px;padding:3px 5px;font-size:9px;background:#1a1a1a;border-color:#2a2a2a;text-align:center;}
.rte-content{min-height:72px;padding:9px 11px;outline:none;font-size:12px;line-height:1.7;color:#fff;background:#0f0f0f;font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;}
.rte-content[data-field="head"]{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:15px;}

.uzone{border:1.5px dashed #2d2d2d;border-radius:6px;padding:10px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:border-color .2s;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.uzone:hover{border-color:var(--d1);}
.uzone input[type="file"]{position:absolute;inset:0;opacity:0;cursor:pointer;width:100%;border:none;padding:0;background:transparent;}
.uzone .utxt{font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:1px;pointer-events:none;}
.uzone .utxt strong{color:var(--d1);display:block;margin-bottom:2px;font-size:9px;}
.uprev{width:100%;height:55px;object-fit:cover;border-radius:3px;margin-top:6px;display:none;}
.ov-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;margin-top:6px;}
.ov-row lbl{margin:0;white-space:nowrap;min-width:68px;}
.ov-row input[type="range"]{width:100%;border:none;padding:0;background:transparent;accent-color:var(--d1);}

.btn-rm{background:none;border:none;color:#333;font-size:14px;cursor:pointer;padding:2px 4px;transition:color .2s;border-radius:3px;}
.btn-rm:hover{color:#c0392b;}
.btn-add{width:100%;padding:10px;background:transparent;border:1px dashed #2a2a2a;color:var(--muted);font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;margin-top:4px;}
.btn-add:hover{border-color:var(--d1);color:var(--d1);}
.actions{margin-top:16px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;}
.btn-p{width:100%;padding:11px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--v1) 0%,#3a0018 100%);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.3);color:#fff;font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:9px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;transition:border-color .2s;}
.btn-p:hover{border-color:var(--d1);}
.btn-s{width:100%;padding:9px;background:transparent;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.35);color:var(--d1);font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:9px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;transition:background .2s;}
.btn-s:hover{background:rgba(201,168,76,.07);}
.xst{margin-top:7px;font-size:8px;color:var(--d1);letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;text-align:center;min-height:14px;}

.prev-area{padding:28px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;background:#0d0d0d;overflow-y:auto;max-height:calc(100vh - 75px);}
.prev-lbl{font-size:7px;font-weight:600;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:20px;align-self:flex-start;}
.slides-prev{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px;width:100%;align-items:center;}
.sw{position:relative;}
.si-lbl{position:absolute;top:-18px;left:0;font-size:7px;color:var(--d1);letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:600;}

.sc{width:405px;height:506px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;}
.sc-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;background-size:cover;background-position:center;z-index:0;}
.sc-ov{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:1;}

.tg{background:var(--preto);display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:flex-end;padding:30px 26px 46px;}
.tg .gbar{position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:3px;z-index:3;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,transparent,var(--d1),transparent);}
.tg .logo{position:absolute;top:16px;right:16px;z-index:3;width:40px;height:40px;object-fit:contain;}
.tg .stag{position:relative;z-index:2;font-size:6px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:3px;color:var(--d1);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:9px;}
.tg .shead{position:relative;z-index:2;line-height:1.2;color:#fff;margin-bottom:11px;}
.tg .sbody{position:relative;z-index:2;font-weight:300;letter-spacing:.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);line-height:1.7;}

.tc{background:#fff;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;padding:36px 30px 46px;}
.tc .tbar{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:4px;z-index:3;background:linear-gradient(to right,var(--v1),var(--d1),var(--v1));}
.tc .logo{position:absolute;bottom:14px;right:16px;z-index:3;width:32px;height:32px;object-fit:contain;opacity:.2;}
.tc .stag{position:relative;z-index:2;font-size:6px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:3px;color:var(--v1);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
.tc .stag::after{content:'';flex:1;height:1px;background:rgba(92,7,38,.2);}
.tc .shead{position:relative;z-index:2;line-height:1.35;color:var(--v1);margin-bottom:12px;}
.tc .sbody{position:relative;z-index:2;line-height:1.9;color:#3a3a3a;}

.td{background:var(--v1);display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;padding:36px 30px 46px;}
.td .deco{position:absolute;top:-38px;right:-38px;z-index:1;width:140px;height:140px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.2);}
.td .logo{position:absolute;bottom:14px;right:16px;z-index:3;width:34px;height:34px;object-fit:contain;opacity:.3;}
.td .stag{position:relative;z-index:2;font-size:6px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:3px;color:var(--d1);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:12px;}
.td .shead{position:relative;z-index:2;line-height:1.25;color:#fff;margin-bottom:12px;}
.td .sbody{position:relative;z-index:2;line-height:1.9;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);}

.tf{background:var(--preto);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:36px 30px 46px;text-align:center;}
.tf .logo{position:relative;z-index:2;width:54px;height:54px;object-fit:contain;margin-bottom:16px;}
.tf .gline{width:30px;height:1px;background:var(--d1);margin:12px auto;position:relative;z-index:2;}
.tf .shead{position:relative;z-index:2;line-height:1.4;color:#fff;margin-bottom:10px;}
.tf .sbody{position:relative;z-index:2;font-weight:300;letter-spacing:1px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.45);line-height:1.9;}

.pbar{position:absolute;bottom:12px;left:26px;right:26px;display:flex;gap:3px;z-index:10;}
.pdot{height:2px;flex:1;border-radius:2px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);}
.pdot.on{background:var(--d1);}

::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px;}
::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:#111;}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:#2a2a2a;border-radius:2px;}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover{background:var(--d1);}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<header class="hdr">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Logo Dra. Rosângela">
  <div><h1>Gerador de Carrossel</h1><span>Dra. Rosângela Andrade — Estética Inteligente</span></div>
</header>

<div class="app">
  <div class="panel">
    <div class="sec">Slides do Carrossel</div>
    <div id="ed"></div>
    <button class="btn-add" onclick="addSlide()">+ Adicionar Slide</button>
    <div class="actions">
      <button class="btn-p" onclick="renderAll()">↻ Atualizar Preview</button>
      <button class="btn-s" onclick="dlAll()">↓ Baixar Todos os Slides (PNG)</button>
    </div>
    <div class="xst" id="xst"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="prev-area">
    <div class="prev-lbl">Preview — 1080 × 1350 px</div>
    <div class="slides-prev" id="sp"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const LOGO = 'data:image/png;base64,';
const TL = {gancho:'Gancho (abertura)',corpo:'Corpo (branco)',destaque:'Destaque (vinho)',fechamento:'Fechamento (preto)'};
const BC = {gancho:'bg',corpo:'bc',destaque:'bd',fechamento:'bf'};

let slides = [
  {type:'gancho',tag:'MOUNJARO & PEPTÍDEOS',head:'<b>Você tomou Mounjaro</b>, emagreceu.<br>E o bumbum foi junto.',body:'Isso tem nome. E tem solução.',img:'',ov:.75,hsize:30,bsize:9},
  {type:'corpo',tag:'VALIDAÇÃO',head:'Não é frescura.<br>Não é falta de treino.',body:'Quando você perde gordura rápido, o bumbum perde volume — e a pele perde firmeza.<br><br>O resultado: bumbum caído, sem forma, sem projeção.',img:'',ov:0,hsize:22,bsize:10},
  {type:'destaque',tag:'POR QUE ACONTECE',head:'O Mounjaro acelera a perda de gordura embaixo da pele.',body:'O bumbum depende dessa gordura para ter forma.<br><br>Academia não repõe isso.<br>Nenhum suplemento repõe isso.',img:'',ov:.6,hsize:26,bsize:10},
  {type:'corpo',tag:'A SOLUÇÃO',head:'O que resolve é repor o volume perdido + estimular o colágeno.',body:'Na mesma sessão. Sem corte. Sem anestesia geral.<br><br>Resultado visível antes de você sair da clínica.',img:'',ov:0,hsize:22,bsize:10},
  {type:'fechamento',tag:'',head:'Se você usou peptídeo e sentiu que perdeu o bumbum —<br>saiba que isso é reversível.',body:'Em 1 sessão.',img:'',ov:.5,hsize:24,bsize:9}
];

// RTE TOOLBAR HTML
function toolbar(i, field) {
  return `<div class="rte-toolbar">
    <button onmousedown="e=>{e.preventDefault()}" onclick="fmt('bold')" title="Negrito"><b>B</b></button>
    <button onclick="fmt('italic')" title="Itálico"><i>I</i></button>
    <button onclick="fmt('underline')" title="Sublinhado"><u>U</u></button>
    <div class="sep"></div>
    <button onclick="fmt('justifyLeft')" title="Esquerda">&#8676;</button>
    <button onclick="fmt('justifyCenter')" title="Centro">&#8700;</button>
    <button onclick="fmt('justifyRight')" title="Direita">&#8677;</button>
    <div class="sep"></div>
    <select onchange="setColor(this.value)" title="Cor do texto">
      <option value="">Cor</option>
      <option value="#ffffff">Branco</option>
      <option value="#C9A84C">Dourado</option>
      <option value="#5C0726">Vinho</option>
      <option value="#0A0A0A">Preto</option>
      <option value="#F0E0D8">Creme</option>
    </select>
    <div class="sep"></div>
    <span style="font-size:8px;color:#666;letter-spacing:1px">TAM</span>
    <input type="number" id="fsize-${i}-${field}" min="8" max="80" value="${field==='head'?slides[i].hsize:slides[i].bsize}"
      onchange="setFontSize(${i},'${field}',this.value)"
      style="width:46px">
    <button onclick="changeFontSize(${i},'${field}',-1)">−</button>
    <button onclick="changeFontSize(${i},'${field}',1)">+</button>
  </div>`;
}

let activeRTE = null;

function fmt(cmd) {
  document.execCommand(cmd, false, null);
  syncRTE();
}

function setColor(color) {
  if(color) document.execCommand('foreColor', false, color);
  syncRTE();
}

function setFontSize(i, field, val) {
  slides[i][field==='head'?'hsize':'bsize'] = parseInt(val);
  renderSlide(i);
}

function changeFontSize(i, field, delta) {
  const key = field==='head'?'hsize':'bsize';
  slides[i][key] = Math.max(8, Math.min(80, (slides[i][key]||12) + delta));
  const inp = document.getElementById(`fsize-${i}-${field}`);
  if(inp) inp.value = slides[i][key];
  renderSlide(i);
}

function syncRTE() {
  if(!activeRTE) return;
  const {i,field} = activeRTE;
  const el = document.getElementById(`rte-${i}-${field}`);
  if(!el) return;
  slides[i][field] = el.innerHTML;
  renderSlide(i);
}

function buildEd() {
  const c = document.getElementById('ed'); c.innerHTML='';
  slides.forEach((s,i) => {
    const d = document.createElement('div');
    d.className='sb'; d.id=`eb${i}`;
    d.innerHTML=`
      <div class="sb-hdr">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px">
          <span class="snum">Slide ${i+1}</span>
          <span class="badge ${BC[s.type]}">${s.type}</span>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:4px;align-items:center">
          <select onchange="chType(${i},this.value)">
            ${Object.entries(TL).map(([v,l])=>`<option value="${v}"${s.type===v?' selected':''}>${l}</option>`).join('')}
          </select>
          ${slides.length>1?`<button class="btn-rm" onclick="rmSlide(${i})">×</button>`:''}
        </div>
      </div>

      <lbl>Tag / Título da seção</lbl>
      <input type="text" value="${(s.tag||'').replace(/"/g,'&quot;')}" oninput="slides[${i}].tag=this.value;renderSlide(${i})" placeholder="Ex: VALIDAÇÃO">

      <lbl>Headline principal</lbl>
      ${toolbar(i,'head')}
      <div class="rte-wrap">
        <div class="rte-content" id="rte-${i}-head" data-field="head" contenteditable="true"
          style="font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:${s.hsize||22}px"
          onfocus="activeRTE={i:${i},field:'head'}"
          oninput="slides[${i}].head=this.innerHTML;renderSlide(${i})"
        >${s.head||''}</div>
      </div>

      <lbl>Texto de apoio</lbl>
      ${toolbar(i,'body')}
      <div class="rte-wrap">
        <div class="rte-content" id="rte-${i}-body" data-field="body" contenteditable="true"
          style="font-size:${s.bsize||10}px"
          onfocus="activeRTE={i:${i},field:'body'}"
          oninput="slides[${i}].body=this.innerHTML;renderSlide(${i})"
        >${s.body||''}</div>
      </div>

      <lbl>Imagem de fundo (opcional)</lbl>
      <div class="uzone">
        <input type="file" accept="image/*" onchange="loadImg(${i},this)">
        <div class="utxt"><strong>${s.img?'✓ Imagem carregada — clique para trocar':'↑ Clique para enviar imagem'}</strong>JPG, PNG, WEBP</div>
        ${s.img?`<img class="uprev" src="${s.img}" style="display:block">`:''}
      </div>
      ${s.img?`
      <div class="ov-row">
        <lbl>Escurecimento</lbl>
        <input type="range" min="0" max="1" step="0.05" value="${s.ov}" oninput="slides[${i}].ov=parseFloat(this.value);renderSlide(${i})">
      </div>
      <div style="text-align:right;margin-top:3px">
        <button class="btn-rm" style="font-size:9px;color:#c0392b" onclick="rmImg(${i})">✕ Remover imagem</button>
      </div>`:''}
    `;
    c.appendChild(d);
  });
}

function loadImg(i,inp){if(!inp.files[0])return;const r=new FileReader();r.onload=e=>{slides[i].img=e.target.result;slides[i].ov=.65;buildEd();renderAll();};r.readAsDataURL(inp.files[0]);}
function rmImg(i){slides[i].img='';slides[i].ov=0;buildEd();renderAll();}
function chType(i,v){slides[i].type=v;buildEd();renderAll();}
function addSlide(){slides.push({type:'corpo',tag:'NOVA SEÇÃO',head:'Título do slide',body:'Texto de apoio aqui.',img:'',ov:0,hsize:22,bsize:10});buildEd();renderAll();}
function rmSlide(i){slides.splice(i,1);buildEd();renderAll();}

function html(s,i,tot){
  const dots=Array.from({length:tot},(_,j)=>`<div class="pdot${j===i?' on':''}"></div>`).join('');
  const pb=`<div class="pbar">${dots}</div>`;
  const bgS=s.img?`style="background-image:url('${s.img}');background-size:cover;background-position:center"`:'';
  const hs=s.hsize||22, bs=s.bsize||10;

  if(s.type==='gancho'){
    const a=s.img?s.ov:.78;
    return `<div class="sc tg" id="sc${i}">
      <div class="sc-bg" ${bgS}></div>
      <div class="sc-ov" style="background:linear-gradient(170deg,rgba(92,7,38,${a}) 0%,rgba(0,0,0,${a*.4}) 40%,rgba(0,0,0,${Math.min(a+.1,1)}) 100%)"></div>
      <div class="gbar"></div>
      <img class="logo" src="${LOGO}">
      <div class="stag">${s.tag||''}</div>
      <div class="shead" style="font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:${hs}px">${s.head||''}</div>
      ${s.body?`<div class="sbody" style="font-size:${bs}px">${s.body}</div>`:''}
      ${pb}</div>`;
  }
  if(s.type==='corpo'){
    const a=s.img?Math.max(s.ov,.82):0;
    const ov=s.img?`<div class="sc-ov" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,${a})"></div>`:'';
    return `<div class="sc tc" id="sc${i}">
      <div class="sc-bg" ${bgS}></div>${ov}
      <div class="tbar"></div>
      <img class="logo" src="${LOGO}">
      <div class="stag">${s.tag||''}</div>
      <div class="shead" style="font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:${hs}px">${s.head||''}</div>
      ${s.body?`<div class="sbody" style="font-size:${bs}px">${s.body}</div>`:''}
      ${pb}</div>`;
  }
  if(s.type==='destaque'){
    const a=s.ov||.6;
    const ov=s.img?`<div class="sc-ov" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(92,7,38,${Math.min(a+.1,1)}) 0%,rgba(0,0,0,${a}) 100%)"></div>`:`<div class="sc-ov" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,0,0,.4) 0%,rgba(120,31,37,.55) 100%)"></div>`;
    return `<div class="sc td" id="sc${i}">
      <div class="sc-bg" ${bgS}></div>${ov}
      <div class="deco"></div>
      <img class="logo" src="${LOGO}">
      <div class="stag">${s.tag||''}</div>
      <div class="shead" style="font-size:${hs}px">${s.head||''}</div>
      ${s.body?`<div class="sbody" style="font-size:${bs}px">${s.body}</div>`:''}
      ${pb}</div>`;
  }
  if(s.type==='fechamento'){
    const a=s.img?s.ov:.3;
    return `<div class="sc tf" id="sc${i}">
      <div class="sc-bg" ${bgS}></div>
      <div class="sc-ov" style="background:radial-gradient(ellipse at center,rgba(92,7,38,${a}) 0%,rgba(0,0,0,${a}) 70%)"></div>
      <img class="logo" src="${LOGO}">
      <div class="gline"></div>
      <div class="shead" style="font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:${hs}px">${s.head||''}</div>
      ${s.body?`<div class="sbody" style="font-size:${bs}px">${s.body}</div>`:''}
      ${pb}</div>`;
  }
}

function renderAll(){
  const c=document.getElementById('sp');c.innerHTML='';
  slides.forEach((s,i)=>{
    const w=document.createElement('div');w.className='sw';
    w.innerHTML=`<div class="si-lbl">Slide ${i+1} — ${TL[s.type]}</div>`+html(s,i,slides.length);
    c.appendChild(w);
  });
}

function renderSlide(i){
  const old=document.getElementById(`sc${i}`);
  if(!old){renderAll();return;}
  const t=document.createElement('div');
  t.innerHTML=html(slides[i],i,slides.length);
  old.replaceWith(t.firstElementChild);
}

async function dlSlide(i){
  const el=document.getElementById(`sc${i}`);if(!el)return;
  const c=await html2canvas(el,{scale:1080/405,useCORS:true,allowTaint:true,backgroundColor:null,width:405,height:506});
  const a=document.createElement('a');
  a.download=`slide_${String(i+1).padStart(2,'0')}_dra_rosangela.png`;
  a.href=c.toDataURL('image/png');a.click();
}

async function dlAll(){
  const st=document.getElementById('xst');
  st.textContent='Gerando slides...';
  const zip = new JSZip();
  for(let i=0;i<slides.length;i++){
    st.textContent=`Processando ${i+1} de ${slides.length}...`;
    const el=document.getElementById(`sc${i}`);
    if(!el) continue;
    const c=await html2canvas(el,{scale:1080/405,useCORS:true,allowTaint:true,backgroundColor:null,width:405,height:506});
    const dataUrl=c.toDataURL('image/png');
    const base64=dataUrl.split(',')[1];
    zip.file(`slide_${String(i+1).padStart(2,'0')}_dra_rosangela.png`, base64, {base64:true});
    await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,300));
  }
  st.textContent='Compactando ZIP...';
  const blob = await zip.generateAsync({type:'blob'});
  const a=document.createElement('a');
  a.href=URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  a.download='carrossel_dra_rosangela.zip';
  a.click();
  st.textContent=`✓ ZIP com ${slides.length} slides baixado!`;
  setTimeout(()=>st.textContent='',5000);
}

buildEd();renderAll();
</script>
</body>
</html>
